--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,100 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## Path Inventory
+
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: Re-exports Hono class, types for Env/Handler/Schema and Context types, HonoRequest type, and InferRequestType/InferResponseType/ClientRequestOptions from ./client
+- **Internal names noticed**: Hono (exported from ./hono)
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./hono, ./types (exports), ./context (imports/exports), ./request (imports types), ./client (imports types)
+- **Plain-English summary**: Main entry point that exports Hono framework along with shared types and re-exports helper modules
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 53 lines of TypeScript, exports core Hono class and re-exports types from submodules
+
+## src/types.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: Env, Bindings/Variables, Input, RouterRoute, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H handler type, NotFoundResponse/Handler, ErrorHandler, HTTPResponseError, and Handler/MiddlewareHandlerInterface
+- **Internal names noticed**: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, Next, HandlerResponse, MergeSchemaPath, MergePath, MergeTypedResponse, ToSchema, TypedResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, Simplify, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./context (imports), ./hono-base (imports), ./utils/headers, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/types
+- **Plain-English summary**: Type definitions module containing core types for Hono's request/response system, handler interfaces, and schema handling
+- **Copy-safe detail**: Extensive TypeScript types (1000+ lines), heavy generic type composition with many nested mapped types
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: Hono class
+- **Internal names noticed**: HonoOptions
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./hono-base (extends), ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types (imports types)
+- **Plain-English summary**: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase and adds default router configuration in constructor
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 34 lines, thin wrapper around HonoBase with router setup
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use methods via type assignment
+- **Internal names noticed**: HonoOptions, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, Router, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, routes, _basePath, #path
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./compose, ./context, ./router (imports), ./router/METHODS/METHOD_NAME_ALL, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- **Plain-English summary**: Base Hono class with method chaining, route registration, request handling, error/notFound handlers, mount for sub-apps
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 545 lines, core middleware composition and routing logic with private fields
+
+## src/context.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: Context class with env, event, executionCtx, res, finalization, header, status, set/get/var methods, newResponse, body, text, json, html, redirect, notFound
+- **Internal names noticed**: Renderer, Get, Set, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, ResponseOrInit, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackCallback, resolveCallback, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IS_ANY, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, Status_code, Data, Get, Set, Renderers
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./request, ./router (imports types), ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types, ./types
+- **Plain-English summary**: Context class managing request lifecycle, response handling, headers, status codes, body rendering (text/json/html), variables, and layout support
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 780 lines, core HTTP response lifecycle implementation
+
+## src/request.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: HonoRequest class with raw, param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob methods, url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath
+- **Internal names noticed**: Body, BodyCache, HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, parseBody, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, RouterRoute, ValidationTargets
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- **Plain-English summary**: Request wrapper class providing param/query/header parsing, body parsing (json/text/arrayBuffer/blob/formData), query parameters, and matched route information
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 505 lines, request parameter extraction and body parsing
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- **Internal names noticed**: Getsymbol GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- **Imports or neighbors**: None standalone
+- **Plain-English summary**: Symbols file exporting GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol used by request.ts for route matching result access
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 1 line, single symbol export
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: parseBody function
+- **Internal names noticed**: BodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, ParseBodyOptions, SimplifyBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, parseFormData, createResponseInstance, setDefaultContentType, TEXT_PLAIN
+- **Imports or neighbors**: ./request (HonoRequest)
+- **Plain-English summary**: Utility for parsing request body, supporting urlencoded, multipart form data, and JSON, with dot notation and all array options
+- **Copy-safe detail**: 233 lines, form data parsing with nested dot notation support
+
+## src/compose.ts
+
+- **Public surface**: compose function
+- **Internal names noticed**: dispatch
+- **I
